backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining an Enquiry type and three public functions to submit, retrieve all, and retrieve a single enquiry by index from an in-memory list.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing styling, components, and functionality.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file that defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme design tokens including colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Adarshpatel Marketing single-page app, mounting the React app at the root div and loading the main TSX entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles the full single-page layout by composing Navbar, Hero, DairyFeedSection, AgriInputsSection, CoffeeTradingSection, ContactSection, and Footer.
frontend/src/components/AgriInputsSectio: React section component displaying six agricultural input product cards (fertilizers, seeds, pesticides, soil care) with category color badges and smooth-scroll enquiry buttons.
frontend/src/components/CoffeeTradingSec: React section component showcasing four coffee trading products on a dark coffee-brown background with decorative patterns, grade/origin labels, and enquiry buttons.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: React contact form component with validation that submits enquiries to the backend canister and opens a pre-filled WhatsApp chat on success.
frontend/src/components/DairyFeedSection: React section component displaying six dairy feed product cards with colored badges, feature lists, and smooth-scroll enquiry buttons linking to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, and contact details (phone, email, address) for Adarshpatel Marketing, including smooth-scroll behavior and a copyright bar.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, gradient overlays, the AP logo, tagline, and CTA buttons that smooth-scroll to the products and contact sections.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with the AP logo, desktop nav links, and a mobile hamburger menu; changes style on scroll and uses smooth-scroll to jump to page sections.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, identity persistence, and delegation validity checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a `useSubmitEnquiry` mutation hook that calls the backend `submitEnquiry` method and invalidates the enquiries query cache on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines an earthy agricultural CSS custom-property color palette for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in React Query's `QueryClientProvider` and the `InternetIdentityProvider`.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), OKLCH-based color tokens (coffee, earth, sidebar, chart), border radius, box shadows, and keyframe animations. Includes plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking a single pending feature request (AR-1) to finalize and deploy the Adarshpatel Marketing site, ensuring the contact form submits to the backend and triggers a pre-filled WhatsApp chat to +91 8431628989 on success.
